name: Cheesy Lemon Spread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the eggs, lemon juice, butter (or margarine), sugar, and salt.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil while stirring over low heat.
3. Continue cooking for an additional 3 minutes after reaching a boil.
4. Beat the cream cheese with the lemon peel until smooth.
5. Allow the egg mixture to cool completely.
6. Blend the cooled egg mixture into the cream cheese until well combined and smooth.
7. Transfer the spread to the refrigerator to chill.
